claim_ceiling.cannot_claim: unusedness, safe retirement or replacement, external-candidate suitability, environment facts not directly evidenced, framework correctness, generalization beyond the snapshot, or authorization for implementation, adoption, migration, or release
claim_ceiling.may_claim: tracked modules, observed static base-tree callers, recorded claim relationships, and evidence-supported diagnostic categories at the pinned commit

population_query: git ls-tree -r --name-only <base_commit> -- governance_tools | filter *.py | sort UTF-8 bytewise ascending

rows.category_basis: Static base-tree callers were observed, but caller presence alone does not establish delegation, replacement, merge, or retirement suitability.
